---
name: Bug Report / XML Validation Failure
about: Create a report to help us improve the schema guidelines or Zod validation errors.
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is. (e.g. Validation fails on field `X`, error code MPW-xxxx is not documented).

**Expected behavior**
What is the expected constraint or logic according to the BPost PDF/XSD?

**XML/JSON Snippet (If applicable)**
```xml
<MailingRequest>
    <!-- Add relevant anonymized payload snippet here -->
</MailingRequest>
```

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g. your orchestration tool, programming language, whether this is an AI agent generated report).
